name: Bramble
description: Winter brambles crossing in the dark, hung with bright berries — every redraw re-tangles the twigs and ripens new fruit.

code.style: --twig: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* both berries in a pair share one emitted ripeness */ --berry: @p(var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color3)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 8%; top: 49%; width: @rand(56%, 92%); height: calc(24px / @Y); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--twig); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 700ms; } } @random(0.4) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 9%; left: @rand(20%, 70%); top: @rand(20%, 70%); border-radius: 50%; background: @var(--berry); box-shadow: calc(60px / @Y) calc(30px / @Y) @var(--berry); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
